title: Mellow American Chicken Hash
description: A sour and velvety one-pot dish made with chicken, apple cider vinegar, and infuse-oil, perfect for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: infuse-oil
ingredients.notes: Use a light oil with a neutral flavor

instructions: Heat the infuse-oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the onion to the skillet.
Cook the onion for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the apple and garlic to the skillet and cook for another 2 minutes.
Sprinkle the flour over the apple mixture and cook for 1 minute.
Slowly add the chicken broth to the skillet, whisking constantly.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook the hash for 5-7 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Season the hash with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
